briefdescription.para: < Prototype declarations for third-party APIs for Elliptic curve related operations

memberdef.argsstring: (EcdsaCrvInfo *CrvInfo, u8 *Hash, u32 HashLen, const u8 *D, const u8 *K, EcdsaSign *Sign)
memberdef.name: Ecdsa_GenerateSign

briefdescription.para: < ECDSA compact code for RSA5X API definitions
Return value in case of success.
